subject: docs(debug): correct CLAUDE.md + track temporary always-on gates + rename test describe
body:
Four small docs drifts that a fresh reader would stumble on:

1. CLAUDE.md project-status bullet claimed the debug system is
   "feature-flagged behind __DEV__" but it isn't — three TEMPORARY
   markers keep it always-on for PWA alpha. Rewrote to reflect reality
   and point at the TODO entry.

2. Added a consolidated docs/TODO.md entry listing all four gates
   that need to flip together post-alpha: the debugAdd early-return,
   the global error-listener registration guard, the console-patch
   guard, and DEBUG_PILL_ENABLED in _layout.tsx. Each in-code
   TEMPORARY marker now references this TODO entry, so they can't
   drift out of sync from the revert checklist.

3. debugLog.ts had a "Security: Only register in development" comment
   immediately above a block that registers regardless. Rewrote to
   describe actual behaviour + the deferred revert.

4. Test file's outer describe was 'debugLog console capture' but now
   covers much more (pub/sub, errDetails, safeStringify, redactUrls,
   report formatting). Renamed to 'debugLog'; the redactUrls nested
   describe stays for specific coverage.

5. Minor: fixed the stale "~450 lines of pill code" comment in
   debugRootMount.web.tsx (DebugPill is ~615 now), shortened the
   duplicate "no className" stylesheet comment in DebugPill.tsx, and
   dropped the specific kilobyte figure from SESSION_NOTES — a
   snapshot not a stable fact.

No behaviour change. tsc 0, jest 79/79.

Tags: docs, debug, policy
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: debug-pill-hardening
Semver: patch
